_doc: Workflow-family manifest: 'these workflows share the same intention and params, with different tradeoffs'. Paths are relative to workflows/. A file absent from this manifest is simply ungrouped (fail-open). ComfyDock is the owner-editor; Muse only reads it and appends members (additive-only) when it pushes/pulls a variant. Entries carry ZERO Muse parameters and are fully creatable without Muse. `model_line` optionally joins model-sources/model-sources.json (gap view = this file x that file). `grade` is an OPAQUE label (rich/gguf/svdq/q5/...); `loader` names which node family the members' models belong to when it matters.

members.path: Sneaky Robot/Qwen AIO Sneaky Robot Safetensors Workflow.json
